title: Compact Matirials
description: a mod adding compact versions of certain matirials
body:
**List of the new items (with their recipes)**
- Compact Iron Block (9 Iron Blocks)
- Super Compact Iron Block (9 Compact Iron Block)
- Compact Gold Block (9 Gold Blocks)
- Super Compact Gold Block (9 Compact Gold Block)
- Compact Diamond Block (9 Diamond Blocks)
- Super Compact Diamond Block (9 Compact Diamond Block
- Cobbled Flint (9 Flint)
- Refined Flint (9 Cobbled Flint)
- Compact Copper Block (9 Copper Blocks)
- Super Compact Copper Block (9 Compact Copper Block)
- Enderpearl Block (4 Enderpearls)
- Enderpearl Bricks (4 Enderpearl Blocks)
- Enderpearl Chiseled Bricks (4 Enderpearl Bricks)
- Compact [All Wood Types] (9 [All Wood Types])
- Super Compact [All Wood Types] (9 Compact [All Wood Types])
